General.Name: Yuanda China Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Yuanda China Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the design, procurement, production, assembling, sale, and installation of curtain wall systems in Mainland China, the United States, the United Kingdom, Qatar, and internationally. The company offers extrusions aluminum, glass, steel and sealant. Yuanda China Holdings Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Shenyang, China.

5.Name: Mr. Leung Fai  Yu AICPA, C.P.A., CPA (Aust), HKICPA
5.Title: Company Secretary
